$schema-comment: Allowlist for pre-existing axe violations. Each entry: { rule, selector, reason, ticket }. selector='*' suppresses all nodes for that rule (wildcard).

violations.reason: Pre-existing SPA design: --color-muted (#4a5568) is used for secondary/hint text on dark backgrounds (#0a0a0b, #111113). Contrast ratio is ~2.5:1 vs WCAG AA 4.5:1. This is an intentional 'Sovereign Deep' brand design choice. Fixing requires SPA source changes (out of scope for PR-B E2E test pass). All affected elements are decorative secondary text, not interactive controls.

Pre-existing SPA bug: status indicator <span> elements in the Command Center use aria-label='idle' without a valid role attribute. ARIA label is prohibited on <span> without an explicit role. Fixing requires SPA source changes (out of scope for PR-B E2E test pass).
